name: Campfire Classics
description: 10 traditional campfire songs everyone recognizes. Three- and four-chord-friendly, all public domain.

songs.title: Kumbaya
songs.lyrics:
[G]Kumba[C]ya, my [G]Lord, kumba[D]ya,
[G]Kumba[C]ya, my [G]Lord, kumba[D]ya,
[G]Kumba[C]ya, my [G]Lord, kumba[Em]ya,
Oh [G]Lord, kumba[D7]ya[G].

[G]Someone's [C]crying, [G]Lord, kumba[D]ya,
[G]Someone's [C]crying, [G]Lord, kumba[D]ya,
[G]Someone's [C]crying, [G]Lord, kumba[Em]ya,
Oh [G]Lord, kumba[D7]ya[G].

[G]Someone's [C]singing, [G]Lord, kumba[D]ya,
[G]Someone's [C]singing, [G]Lord, kumba[D]ya,
[G]Someone's [C]singing, [G]Lord, kumba[Em]ya,
Oh [G]Lord, kumba[D7]ya[G].

[G]Someone's [C]praying, [G]Lord, kumba[D]ya,
[G]Someone's [C]praying, [G]Lord, kumba[D]ya,
[G]Someone's [C]praying, [G]Lord, kumba[Em]ya,
Oh [G]Lord, kumba[D7]ya[G].

songs.title: Swing Low, Sweet Chariot
songs.lyrics:
[G]Swing low, sweet [C]chari[G]ot,
Coming for to carry me [D]home.
[G]Swing low, sweet [C]chari[G]ot,
Coming for to [D]carry me [G]home.

I [G]looked over [C]Jordan and [G]what did I see,
Coming for to carry me [D]home?
A [G]band of angels [C]coming after [G]me,
Coming for to [D]carry me [G]home.

[G]Swing low, sweet [C]chari[G]ot,
Coming for to carry me [D]home.
[G]Swing low, sweet [C]chari[G]ot,
Coming for to [D]carry me [G]home.

If [G]you get there [C]before I [G]do,
Coming for to carry me [D]home,
[G]Tell all my friends I'm [C]coming too,
Coming for to [D]carry me [G]home.

songs.title: My Bonnie Lies Over the Ocean
songs.lyrics:
My [G]Bonnie lies [C]over the [G]ocean,
My [G]Bonnie lies [D]over the [D7]sea,
My [G]Bonnie lies [C]over the [G]ocean,
Oh [G]bring back my [D]Bonnie to [G]me.

[G]Bring back, [C]bring back,
Oh [G]bring back my [D]Bonnie to [D7]me, to [G]me,
[G]Bring back, [C]bring back,
Oh [G]bring back my [D]Bonnie to [G]me.

Last [G]night as I [C]lay on my [G]pillow,
Last [G]night as I [D]lay on my [D7]bed,
Last [G]night as I [C]lay on my [G]pillow,
I [G]dreamed that my [D]Bonnie was [G]dead.

[G]Bring back, [C]bring back,
Oh [G]bring back my [D]Bonnie to [D7]me, to [G]me,
[G]Bring back, [C]bring back,
Oh [G]bring back my [D]Bonnie to [G]me.

The [G]winds have blown [C]over the [G]ocean,
The [G]winds have blown [D]over the [D7]sea,
The [G]winds have blown [C]over the [G]ocean,
And [G]brought back my [D]Bonnie to [G]me.

songs.title: She'll Be Coming 'Round the Mountain
songs.lyrics:
She'll be [C]comin' 'round the mountain when she comes,
She'll be [F]comin' 'round the mountain when she [C]comes,
She'll be [C]comin' 'round the [F]mountain,
She'll be [C]comin' 'round the [G]mountain,
She'll be [C]comin' 'round the [G]mountain when she [C]comes.

She'll be [C]drivin' six white horses when she comes (yee-haw!),
She'll be [F]drivin' six white horses when she [C]comes (yee-haw!),
She'll be [C]drivin' six white [F]horses,
She'll be [C]drivin' six white [G]horses,
She'll be [C]drivin' six white [G]horses when she [C]comes (yee-haw!).

songs.title: Down by the Riverside
songs.lyrics:
Gonna [G]lay down my burden,
Down by the [D]riverside,
Down by the [G]riverside,
Down by the [C]riverside.
Gonna [G]lay down my burden,
Down by the [D]riverside,
Gonna [G]study [D]war no [G]more.

I [G]ain't gonna study war no more,
I [G]ain't gonna [D]study war no [G]more,
I [G]ain't gonna study [C]war no [G]more.
I [G]ain't gonna study war no more,
I [G]ain't gonna [D]study war no [G]more,
I [G]ain't gonna study [D]war no [G]more.

songs.title: Michael, Row the Boat Ashore
songs.lyrics:
[C]Michael, row the [F]boat a[C]shore, halle[Am]lujah!
[C]Michael, row the [F]boat a[C]shore, halle[G]lu[C]jah!

[C]Sister, help to [F]trim the [C]sail, halle[Am]lujah!
[C]Sister, help to [F]trim the [C]sail, halle[G]lu[C]jah!

[C]Jordan's river is [F]chilly and [C]cold, halle[Am]lujah!
[C]Chills the body but [F]not the [C]soul, halle[G]lu[C]jah!

songs.title: Oh My Darling, Clementine
songs.lyrics:
In a [G]cavern, in a canyon,
Excavating for a [D]mine,
Dwelt a miner, forty-niner,
And his daughter Clemen[G]tine.

Oh my [G]darling, oh my darling,
Oh my darling Clemen[D]tine,
Thou art lost and gone forever,
Dreadful sorry, Clemen[G]tine.

Light she [G]was and like a fairy,
And her shoes were number [D]nine,
Herring boxes without topses,
Sandals were for Clemen[G]tine.

songs.title: Red River Valley
songs.lyrics:
From this [G]valley they [C]say you are [G]going,
We will [G]miss your bright [D]eyes and sweet [G]smile,
For they [G]say you are [C]taking the [G]sunshine,
That has [G]brightened our [D]pathway a[G]while.

Come and [G]sit by my [C]side if you [G]love me,
Do not [G]hasten to [D]bid me a[G]dieu,
Just re[G]member the [C]Red River [G]Valley,
And the [G]cowboy who [D]loved you so [G]true.

songs.title: Home on the Range
songs.chords: G C D D7 Em A7
songs.lyrics:
Oh, [G]give me a home where the [C]buffalo [G]roam,
Where the [Em]deer and the [A7]antelope [D]play,
Where [G]seldom is heard a dis[C]couraging [G]word,
And the [Em]skies are not [D7]cloudy all [G]day.

[G]Home, [D7]home on the [G]range,
Where the [C]deer and the [G]antelope [D7]play,
Where [G]seldom is heard a dis[C]couraging [G]word,
And the [Em]skies are not [D7]cloudy all [G]day.

songs.title: Shenandoah
songs.lyrics:
Oh [G]Shenan[Em]doah, I [C]long to [G]hear you,
[G]Away, you [Em]rolling [D]river.
Oh [G]Shenan[Em]doah, I [C]long to [G]hear you,
[G]Away, I'm [D]bound away,
'Cross the [C]wide Mis[D]sou[G]ri.

Oh [G]Shenan[Em]doah, I [C]love your [G]daughter,
[G]Away, you [Em]rolling [D]river.
For [G]her I'd [Em]cross your [C]roaming [G]waters,
[G]Away, I'm [D]bound away,
'Cross the [C]wide Mis[D]sou[G]ri.
